name: v0.6.0 — Domain Registration
body:
## Phase 6: Domain Registration (ResellerClub)

Full domain registrar module competing directly with WHMCS domain features.

### Registrar: ResellerClub (LogicBoxes)
- HTTP JSON API, no XML
- Auth via auth-userid + api-key query params
- Sandbox at test.httpapi.com, toggle in Settings -> Registrar
- Widest TLD catalog of any reseller API

### Database
- `domain_tlds` - TLD catalog with per-TLD register/renew/transfer pricing, EPP required, WHOIS privacy available flags, grace/redemption periods
- `domains` - Full domain records: status, expiry, auto_renew, nameservers (ns1-ns4), registrar_order_id, billing_cycle, lock, WHOIS privacy
- `domain_contacts` - Per-domain WHOIS contacts (registrant/admin/tech/billing) with cached registrar_contact_id
- `invoice_items.domain_id` - Links renewal invoices to specific domains

### Contracts and DTOs
- `DomainRegistrarModule` interface (11 methods)
- `DomainCheckResult` DTO: domain, tld, available, premium, price, error
- `DomainResult` DTO: success, message, data, error
- `RegistrarService` - resolves the active module from settings

### Features
- Bulk availability check across all active TLDs in one API call
- Registration with automatic registrar contact creation and ID caching
- Renewal triggered by invoice payment
- Transfer with EPP code support
- Nameserver management from admin and client portal
- WHOIS privacy toggle (where TLD supports it)
- Transfer lock and unlock
- EPP code retrieval - fetched on demand, never stored, shown once
- Domain info sync from registrar

### Jobs (queue, retries on backoff)
- `RegisterDomainJob` - on invoice paid for domain product, 3 retries x 60s
- `RenewDomainJob` - on renewal invoice paid, 3 retries x 60s
- `TransferDomainJob` - on transfer invoice paid, 3 retries x 60s
- `SyncDomainJob` - admin-triggered or cron, 2 retries x 120s

### Scheduled Commands
- `commerce:check-expiring-domains` - daily 04:00, generates renewal invoices for active auto-renew domains expiring within 30 days
- `commerce:sync-domain-statuses` - daily 05:00, queues SyncDomainJob for all active/expired domains

### Admin
- Domains list: filter by status, TLD, client, search
- Domain detail: nameserver form, WHOIS privacy toggle, lock toggle, EPP reveal, registrant contact display, notes, sync button
- TLD Manager CRUD: per-TLD register/renew/transfer prices, EPP required, WHOIS privacy, active flag
- Settings -> Registrar tab: module selector, API credentials (auth-userid, api-key), sandbox toggle, connection test button

### Client Portal
- /client/domains/search - check availability across all TLDs, shows price per result
- /client/domains/register - registration form with years selector and registrant contact (pre-filled from profile)
- /client/domains - My Domains list with status badge and expiry warning
- /client/domains/{domain} - manage nameservers, toggle WHOIS privacy and auto-renew, request EPP code

### Key Design Decisions
- Auto-renew is OFF at the registrar level - Commerce manages renewals via invoice payment
- EPP codes are never stored permanently - fetched from registrar API on demand, shown once
- Registrant contact created once at registrar, contact ID cached in domain_contacts for reuse
- InvoiceService.markPaid() dispatches RegisterDomainJob or RenewDomainJob depending on invoice type
